trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h bearish engulfing candle or failure to break $74,900 resistance
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Alignment of professional trader distribution (Smart Money), overbought oscillators on the 4h timeframe, and a clear bearish expansion on the 1h MACD histogram while at the 93rd percentile of the 7d range.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close below EMA20 (2334.68) after retesting resistance
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Significant smart money net outflow (-$6.4M) combined with overbought RSI and accelerating negative funding velocity, suggesting a long flush is imminent.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price rebound from EMA20 (615.54) with rising taker buy ratio
confluence_signals: Extreme Short Crowd (12th Pct L/S Ratio)
Fear and Greed Index Contrarian Signal
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: The extreme short positioning of retail accounts creates a squeeze opportunity, further supported by Binance trading at a -0.08% discount which typically triggers arbitrage buy pressure.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h MACD histogram remains negative while price retests EMA20
trade_plans.invalidation: 1h RSI crosses above 50 with rising volume
confluence_signals: Open Interest Rising on Price Drop
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Rising OI during price declines indicates new short conviction. This trend, coupled with the price being below all major 1h EMAs, favors a continuation toward the 7d low.

results.cross_asset_insight: The ETH/BTC ratio is rising (Risk-On) while the market-wide Fear & Greed Index is at 12 (Extreme Fear). This massive divergence suggests a local technical correction (led by Smart Money distribution) will likely be met by a violent contrarian bounce once retail shorts are squeezed.
